overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving from a neon-lit downtown street through an urban canyon and into a sunlit highway with elevated overpasses. The clip showcases the game's detailed futuristic architecture and dynamic lighting as the environment transitions from artificial neon to golden hour sunlight.

events.description: pedestrians begin crossing the street at a crosswalk ahead
large green billboard on the right glitches and turns white briefly before returning
silver sedan drives through the intersection ahead of the camera

agents.ego_description: driving forward through downtown street, slowing for pedestrians at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street from left to right in the crosswalk
silver sedan driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboard displaying an animated character with red hair and hat against green background
vertical neon signage on building facades with red and yellow illumination
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and glass facades
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through a neon-lit downtown street at dusk, approaching a busy intersection with pedestrians crossing. A large green anime billboard dominates the right side while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. The vehicle slows as people cross the road, and the billboard briefly glitches to white.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon street with elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: vehicle turns right onto a narrower street between tall buildings
environment transitions from artificial neon to natural sunlight as vehicle approaches the open highway

agents.ego_description: turning right onto a narrower street and accelerating through an urban canyon toward a sunlit area

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi passing by on the left side of the street

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure spanning across the street ahead
older brick buildings with ground-level neon signage
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with metal railings

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a narrower urban canyon, leaving the neon-lit intersection behind. The vehicle accelerates toward a bright opening where elevated highways and overpasses become visible. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to warm natural sunlight as the street opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway beneath elevated roadways

events.description: exiting dark urban canyon into bright sunlit highway with multiple concrete overpasses
vehicle slows down and comes to a stop under an overpass as traffic ahead brakes

agents.ego_description: driving along a multi-lane highway beneath elevated overpasses, following traffic into bright sunlight, eventually stopping under an overpass

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead and braking under the overpass
black SUV passing on the left side of the vehicle

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass casting long shadows across the road
large digital screen displaying purple and pink neon advertisement with female figure
utilitarian industrial structures with metal facades and minimal windows
bright golden hour sunlight streaming through the overpasses creating lens flare

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath a complex network of elevated highways and overpasses in bright golden hour sunlight. The environment shifts from dense urban neon to open industrial highway. The vehicle follows a silver sedan through the sun-dappled street, eventually slowing to a stop under a massive concrete overpass as traffic ahead brakes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-drenched downtown intersection into a sun-dappled industrial highway. It begins by navigating a busy street at dusk, passing a glitching green anime billboard and pedestrians under the shadow of towering skyscrapers. As the vehicle turns right, the scene shifts from the artificial glow of the city into a narrow urban canyon that accelerates toward a bright, open horizon. The lighting then transforms from neon hues to warm golden hour sunlight as the camera moves beneath a complex network of elevated concrete overpasses. Finally, the environment opens into a wide highway where the vehicle follows a silver sedan before slowing to a stop amidst the sun-dappled traffic.
